name: Pulser Scrum Master
description: Policy-gated Scrum Master agent for Azure DevOps. Produces daily standups, weekly velocity and DORA rollups, sprint retrospectives, and doctrine-drift scans against the ipai-platform project. Read-heavy by default; mutating actions (work-item comment, tag update) are evaluator-gated and scoped to an allowlist. Backed by Microsoft Foundry gpt-4.1 in production (Foundry Local phi-4 in dev). Peer of Tax Guru, Bank Recon, and Pulser Planner over A2A.

skills.name: Daily standup
skills.description: Summarizes what closed yesterday, what is active today, and blockers in the active iteration. Read-only against Azure Boards; posts a markdown digest to a configured surface.
examples: Give me the standup for iteration R2.S3 team ipai-platform.
What changed in Sprint 7 since yesterday 9am?

skills.name: Weekly velocity and DORA
skills.description: Computes burn-up, velocity trend, lead time, change failure rate, and MTTR for the current and prior iterations using Azure DevOps Analytics OData. Emits a markdown summary plus a PNG chart.
examples: Velocity rollup for the last 3 iterations.
Show me DORA metrics for ipai-platform R2 so far.

skills.name: Sprint retrospective synthesis
skills.description: Synthesizes end-of-sprint themes from work-item comments, closed items, drift findings, and prior retro actions. Only free-form reasoning step in the agent; evaluator-gated before any write.
examples: Summarize what went well and what did not in sprint 7.

skills.name: Doctrine drift scan
skills.description: Scans active work items for doctrine violations (GitHub Actions, Vercel, Supabase, n8n, Cloudflare, Odoo 19 references; orphan area paths; stale states) against the CLAUDE.md deprecation and area-path canonical lists. Emits structured findings and proposes L1 allowlist tag updates, never closes items.
examples: Find any active items still referencing Supabase.
